project: EURABAY Living System - Active Trade Management
description: Dynamic trade management system with trailing stops, partial profits, breakeven mechanisms, and holding time optimization to maximize trade performance

userStories.title: Create active trade manager foundation
userStories.description: As a system architect, I need a foundational trade manager that monitors and manages all open positions.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement calculate_current_pnl() method for each position
Implement get_trade_state() method (pending, open, partial, closed)
Add comprehensive logging for all trade operations
Create unit tests for trade manager foundation

userStories.title: Implement trailing stop mechanism
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to move stop losses as price moves favorably to protect profits.
acceptanceCriteria: - If LONG: move SL up when price > entry + trail_distance
- If SHORT: move SL down when price < entry - trail_distance
- Never move SL against position (only lock in profits)
Calculate new SL: if LONG, SL = max(current_SL, price - trail_distance)
Implement minimum profit before trailing (must be 1R in profit first)
Implement trail_step (minimum price movement before updating SL, default 0.5x ATR)
Log all trailing stop updates with old and new SL
Send trailing stop update to MT5
Test trailing stop on historical data

userStories.title: Implement breakeven mechanism
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to move stop loss to breakeven when trade is sufficiently profitable.
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger breakeven when position reaches 1.5R profit
Move SL to entry price + spread (ensure no loss if triggered)
Implement breakeven buffer (move SL slightly past entry, default 2 pips)
Implement breakeven lock (never move SL back from breakeven)
Implement breakeven cooldown (wait 5 minutes after entry before enabling)
Send breakeven SL update to MT5
Breakeven should protect 90%+ of trades that reach 1.5R

userStories.title: Implement partial profit taking
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to close partial positions at predefined profit levels to bank profits early.
acceptanceCriteria: - Close remaining at 5R or trailing stop
Execute partial close via MT5 when trigger hit
Move SL to breakeven after first partial close
Log all partial close operations with percentage and profit
Test partial profit taking on historical data
Partial profits should increase overall win rate

userStories.title: Implement holding time optimization
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to close trades that have been open too long without reaching targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Define maximum holding times (configurable by regime):
Check if trade is profitable (if losing, cut immediately)
If profitable but time limit exceeded: close 50% position
If very old (> 2x limit): close entire position
Track holding time statistics in database
Test holding time optimization on historical data

userStories.title: Implement scale-in functionality
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to add to positions as they move favorably to maximize winners.
acceptanceCriteria: - Add 50% more position when trade reaches 1R profit
- Add another 25% when trade reaches 2R profit
Only scale in if trade is moving in favor (trend confirmation)
Only scale in if signal quality remains high
Calculate new SL for scaled position (weighted average)
Scale-in should improve profit factor on winning trades

userStories.title: Implement scale-out functionality
userStories.description: As a trade manager, I need to reduce positions gradually to lock in profits while keeping upside potential.
acceptanceCriteria: - Close 25% at 2R, 25% at 3R, 25% at 4R, hold rest
Use scale-out instead of partial profit taking (alternative strategy)
Move SL to breakeven after first scale-out

userStories.title: Implement position monitoring loop
userStories.description: As a system, I need a continuous monitoring loop that checks all open positions every 5 seconds.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch all open positions from MT5
Test monitoring loop with multiple positions

userStories.title: Implement trade state machine
userStories.description: As a system, I need to track trade states and transitions for proper lifecycle management.
acceptanceCriteria: - PENDING: Order sent, not yet filled
Enforce state-based rules (e.g., can't scale out if not scaled in)
Test state machine with all transitions

userStories.title: Implement manual override capability
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to manually override active management and close positions when needed.
acceptanceCriteria: Expose manual controls via REST API
Log all manual overrides with user and reason

userStories.title: Implement active management API endpoints
userStories.description: As a frontend, I need API endpoints to control and monitor active trade management.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement GET /api/trades/active - all actively managed trades
Implement GET /api/trades/:id/state - trade state and history
Implement PUT /api/trades/:id/sl - manual stop loss update
Implement PUT /api/trades/:id/tp - manual take profit update
Implement GET /api/trades/performance - active vs passive management comparison

userStories.title: Implement trade lifecycle logging
userStories.description: As a system, I need detailed logging of all trade lifecycle events for analysis and debugging.
acceptanceCriteria: Log all trade events: entry, SL updates, TP updates, partial closes, full close
Log trade state at each event
Log management actions taken: trailing stop, breakeven, partial profit, etc.
Log market conditions at time of action
Store all lifecycle events in database

userStories.title: Implement active vs passive performance tracking
userStories.description: As a system, I need to compare actively managed trades vs set-and-forget trades to prove value.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate what-if scenario: if trade was set-and-forget (no active management)
Compare metrics: win rate, profit factor, average win/loss, max drawdown
- Trailing stop: how many times it saved profit
- Breakeven: how many times it prevented loss
- Partial profit: how much profit banked early
- Holding time limit: how many bad trades avoided
Test on historical data (backtest active vs passive)

userStories.title: Implement adaptive management parameters
userStories.description: As a system, I need to adjust management parameters based on market conditions and recent performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Adjust trailing distance based on volatility (2x ATR in normal, 3x ATR in high vol)
Adjust partial profit levels based on recent win rate
Adjust holding time limits based on regime
Adjust scale-in rules based on account risk
Implement parameter optimization (test different settings on historical data)
Update parameters weekly based on performance
Test adaptive parameters on historical data
Adaptive parameters should improve Sharpe ratio by 10%+

userStories.title: Implement management action alerts
userStories.description: As a trader, I need to receive alerts when important management actions are taken.
acceptanceCriteria: Send alert when trailing stop is updated
Send alert when breakeven is triggered
Send alert when partial profit is taken
Send alert when position is closed (any reason)
Send alert when manual override is used
Send alert when position hits holding time limit
Send alerts via WebSocket to frontend
Implement alert priority levels (INFO, WARNING, CRITICAL)

functionalRequirements: FR-1: System must actively monitor all open positions every 5 seconds
FR-2: System must implement trailing stops to protect profits
FR-3: System must implement breakeven to prevent losses
FR-4: System must implement partial profit taking to bank profits early
FR-5: System must implement holding time limits to avoid stale trades
FR-6: System must track trade state throughout lifecycle
FR-7: System must allow manual override when needed
FR-8: System must log all management actions for analysis
nonGoals: No automated scaling in initially (add in Phase 2 if profitable)
No complex optimization algorithms (keep rules simple)
No ML for management decisions (rule-based is sufficient)
technicalConsiderations: Monitoring loop must be efficient (< 1 second total for all positions)
All MT5 operations must be atomic (avoid partial failures)
Management actions must be logged with full context
System must handle MT5 disconnections gracefully
Manual overrides must take precedence over automated actions
Trade state must be recoverable after system restart
Active management should improve performance without increasing risk
Management parameters must be backtested before deployment
System must track the effectiveness of each management action
successMetrics: Active management improves win rate by 10%+ compared to set-and-forget
Active management improves profit factor by 0.5+
Trailing stops capture 20%+ additional profit on winning trades
Breakeven prevents losses on 80%+ of trades that reach 1.5R
Partial profits bank 30%+ of total profit early
Holding time limits reduce average trade duration by 30%
Active management reduces maximum drawdown by 20%+
Manual overrides are used < 10% of the time (system is autonomous)
